allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit: EPM Notification Service project structure *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add local testing infrastructure and documentation *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix TypeScript compilation and local testing setup *)

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 7071 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Port 7071 held by: $\($p.ProcessName\) \(PID $\($p.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }; Write-Host "Killed." } else { Write-Host "Nothing listening on 7071." })
